stemHtml: Based on the regulations established on ICAO Annex 2 and SERA, is it permissible to conduct IFR flights at an altitude of 2600 ft AGL?

options.a: NO, IFR flight in uncontrolled airspace is prohibited.
options.b: NO, IFR is allowed ONLY above 3000 ft AGL.
options.c: YES, if the state itself makes own regulations, which may NOT be the same as ICAO Annex 2 & SERA.
options.d: YES, since the flight levels are used from 3000 m and above.
